name: EOD Historical Data (Financial Market Data API)
pricing_notes: Free: 20 req/day, 1y EOD; All-World $20/mo; All-World Extended $40/mo; All-In-One $80/mo

auth.notes: API token as query parameter or SDK initialization

performance.notes: REST API; global CDN; CSV or JSON output

agent_readiness.notes: Broad global equity coverage: 70+ exchanges, 150k+ tickers, 30+ years history. EODHD Python SDK. EodHistoricalData(api_key=key). get_eod_historical_stock_market_data(ticker='AAPL', exchange='US'). Fundamentals: income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, earnings. Bulk download of all exchange tickers. Options chains. Macro indicators. Insider transactions. Institutional holdings. Broader coverage than Tiingo; more affordable than Bloomberg.

gotchas: Some endpoints require higher subscription tiers
Real-time data add-on required for live quotes
Data quality varies by exchange (US better than emerging markets)
best_when: Global equity EOD data across 70+ exchanges
Long historical data (30+ years) for backtesting
Fundamentals data (income statement, balance sheet, earnings)
Affordable Bloomberg alternative for quant research
avoid_when: When Tiingo or yfinance coverage is sufficient
summary: EOD Historical Data (EODHD) provides global equity data: 70+ exchanges, 150k+ tickers, 30+ years EOD history, fundamentals, options, insider data, macro indicators. Python SDK for easy access. get_eod_historical_stock_market_data('AAPL', 'US'). Broader global coverage than Tiingo, more affordable than premium providers. Good Bloomberg alternative for quant researchers.
